title: Data Scientist
description: You love predictions and modelling. Your curiosity for machine learning, statistics, and extracting deep insights from data makes Data Science your best path.
why_right_for_you: Your interest in patterns, predictions, and mathematical thinking makes Data Science a natural fit. You enjoy going deeper than surface-level insights — you want to build models that forecast outcomes and uncover hidden relationships in data.
why_good_fit: Strong alignment with ML modelling, statistics, and Python-based data analysis workflows.
next_steps: Build a strong foundation in statistics and Python. Learn Scikit-learn for ML, then explore deep learning with TensorFlow/PyTorch. Compete on Kaggle.
career_path: Intern → Junior Data Scientist → Data Scientist → Senior DS → Lead / Head of Data Science
jd_text: We are looking for a Data Scientist with strong Python skills and experience in machine learning, statistical modelling, and data analysis. You will build predictive models, perform feature engineering, and extract insights from large datasets. Experience with Scikit-learn, TensorFlow or PyTorch is required. Familiarity with Pandas, NumPy, and data visualisation tools is essential. You should be comfortable with SQL and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP). A strong understanding of statistics and probability is a must.

title: Data Analyst
description: You excel at finding patterns in data and communicating insights to business teams. SQL, dashboards, and storytelling through data are your core tools.
why_right_for_you: You are naturally analytical and enjoy translating numbers into business decisions. You prefer working with structured data, building dashboards, and helping non-technical stakeholders understand trends.
why_good_fit: Strong match with SQL, reporting, and business intelligence requirements.
next_steps: Master SQL and Excel first. Learn Power BI or Tableau for dashboards. Pick up Python for automation. Study business metrics and KPIs.
career_path: Junior Analyst → Data Analyst → Senior Analyst → Analytics Manager → Head of Analytics
jd_text: Seeking a Data Analyst with strong SQL skills and experience building dashboards and reports. You will analyse business data, track KPIs, and present findings to stakeholders. Proficiency in Power BI or Tableau is required. Python knowledge for data manipulation is a plus. You should have experience with Excel, data cleaning, and writing complex SQL queries. Strong communication skills are essential — you will present insights to non-technical teams regularly.

title: Data Engineer
description: You enjoy building the infrastructure that powers data teams. Pipelines, databases, and scalable data architecture are where you thrive.
why_right_for_you: You like engineering problems more than analysis. You want to build the systems that move, store, and transform data at scale. Data Engineering sits at the intersection of software and data.
why_good_fit: Strong fit for pipeline engineering, cloud infrastructure, and scalable data architecture.
next_steps: Learn Python and SQL deeply. Study Apache Spark and Airflow for pipelines. Get comfortable with cloud data warehouses like BigQuery or Redshift. Learn dbt.
career_path: Junior DE → Data Engineer → Senior DE → Lead DE → Data Platform Architect
jd_text: We need a Data Engineer to design and maintain scalable data pipelines and infrastructure. You will build ETL processes, manage data warehouses, and ensure data quality across the organisation. Experience with Python, SQL, and pipeline orchestration tools like Airflow or Prefect is required. Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and big data tools like Spark is important. Experience with dbt, Kafka, or streaming data is a strong plus.

title: AI / LLM Engineer
description: You are excited about large language models, RAG pipelines, and building intelligent AI applications. This is the fastest growing AI role in 2024-25.
why_right_for_you: You want to build with the latest AI technology. You enjoy combining retrieval systems, prompt engineering, and LLMs to create applications that feel genuinely intelligent.
why_good_fit: Perfect fit for RAG architecture, LangChain agents, and LLM application development.
next_steps: Master LangChain and RAG architecture. Build projects with OpenAI/Groq APIs. Learn FAISS or ChromaDB for vector search. Study prompt engineering deeply.
career_path: ML Eng → LLM Engineer → Senior LLM Eng → AI Lead → AI Architect
jd_text: Looking for an AI/LLM Engineer to build production-ready AI applications using large language models. You will design RAG pipelines, build LangChain agents, integrate vector databases (FAISS, Pinecone, ChromaDB), and deploy LLM-powered features. Strong Python skills required. Experience with OpenAI, Anthropic, or open-source LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral) is essential. Knowledge of prompt engineering, embeddings, and LLM evaluation is a must. Familiarity with HuggingFace transformers is a strong plus.

title: ML Engineer
description: You want to take ML models from notebook to production. You bridge the gap between data science research and real-world deployed systems.
why_right_for_you: You enjoy both the model side and the engineering side. You want to ship ML systems that actually run in production, scale well, and are maintainable.
why_good_fit: Strong match for MLOps, model deployment, and production ML system design.
next_steps: Learn MLflow for experiment tracking. Study Docker and Kubernetes for deployment. Get comfortable with FastAPI for model serving. Learn cloud ML services (SageMaker, Vertex AI).
career_path: Junior ML Eng → ML Engineer → Senior ML Eng → Staff ML Eng → Principal / ML Architect
jd_text: We are hiring an ML Engineer to build, train, and deploy machine learning models at scale. You will own the full ML lifecycle from data preparation to production deployment and monitoring. Strong Python and PyTorch/TensorFlow skills required. Experience with MLflow, Docker, and cloud platforms is essential. You should be comfortable building REST APIs for model serving and setting up CI/CD pipelines for ML systems. Experience with Kubernetes and model monitoring tools is a strong plus.

title: Computer Vision Engineer
description: You want to build systems that see and understand the visual world using deep learning and image processing.
why_right_for_you: You are drawn to visual problems — object detection, image classification, video understanding. You enjoy combining mathematics with real-world visual applications.
why_good_fit: Excellent fit for image/video AI systems, YOLO-based detection, and visual deep learning.
next_steps: Master OpenCV and PyTorch. Learn YOLO for object detection. Build projects on public datasets. Study CNNs and Vision Transformers (ViT).
career_path: ML Eng → CV Engineer → Senior CV Eng → Research Scientist / CV Lead
jd_text: Seeking a Computer Vision Engineer with experience in deep learning for image and video analysis. You will build object detection, segmentation, and classification systems using PyTorch and OpenCV. Experience with YOLO, Faster R-CNN, or similar architectures required. Strong Python skills and understanding of CNN architectures is essential. Familiarity with model optimisation (quantisation, pruning) and edge deployment is a plus.

title: NLP Engineer
description: You want to build systems that understand, generate, and process human language — from text classification to chatbots.
why_right_for_you: Language fascinates you. You enjoy building systems that understand text, extract meaning, and generate human-like responses. NLP sits at the heart of every AI product.
why_good_fit: Strong match for transformer-based NLP, text classification, and conversational AI.
next_steps: Learn HuggingFace Transformers deeply. Build projects with BERT and GPT models. Study named entity recognition and text classification. Explore fine-tuning.
career_path: ML Eng → NLP Engineer → Senior NLP Eng → Research Scientist
jd_text: Looking for an NLP Engineer with hands-on experience building natural language processing systems. You will work on text classification, named entity recognition, summarisation, and question answering. Strong experience with HuggingFace Transformers and Python required. Familiarity with BERT, RoBERTa, and GPT-style models is essential. Experience fine-tuning pre-trained models on custom datasets is a strong requirement.

title: Prompt Engineer
description: You specialise in designing and optimising prompts that get the best possible outputs from large language models.
why_right_for_you: You have a talent for clear communication and logical structuring. You enjoy experimenting with how language shapes AI behaviour and building robust prompt systems.
why_good_fit: Natural fit for LLM evaluation, system prompt design, and prompt-based workflow automation.
next_steps: Study few-shot and chain-of-thought prompting. Build an LLM evaluation framework. Learn about system prompts and prompt injection. Contribute to open-source prompt libraries.
career_path: Prompt Engineer → LLM Engineer → AI Product Manager → AI Lead
jd_text: We are looking for a Prompt Engineer who can design, test, and optimise prompts for production LLM systems. You will develop prompt templates, build evaluation pipelines, and work closely with ML engineers to improve model outputs. Strong understanding of LLM behaviour, few-shot learning, and chain-of-thought reasoning is required. Python scripting for automation is important. Experience with LangChain, OpenAI API, or similar tools is a plus.
